title: LockSlot
description: Prevents accidental drop of an item
body:
**🔒 Slot Lock — Inventory Item Protection**

Tired of accidentally dropping important items? This mod solves the problem once and for all.

**Slot Lock** allows you to lock any inventory slots so you can’t accidentally drop or lose your items.

### ✨ Features:

* 🔒 Lock individual slots (Q from hotbar or inventory)
* 🚫 Prevent dropping items from locked slots
* 🪶 Lightweight and fast — no FPS impact
* ✨ You can still drop an item by picking it up from your inventory and clicking on an empty space outside of your inventory. 
### 🎯 Why use it:

* Prevent losing important items
* Perfect for PvP and survival, where every item matters

### 🛠️ Compatibility:

* Works on Fabric
* Supported Minecraft version: **1.21.4**

### 📌 Usage:

```
/lockslot — show help  
/lockslot <1-9> — toggle hotbar slot lock  
/lockslot inv <1-27> — toggle inventory slot lock  
/lockslot color — list available colors  
/lockslot color <red|blue|green|orange|yellow|purple|cyan|pink> — change icon color  
/lockslot list — show locked slots  
/lockslot all — remove all locks  
/lockslot clear — same as "all"
```

📩 For questions and bug reports: Telegram / Discord — **@b1nt1n**
